title: manihot palmata var. multifida
intro: Manihot palmata var. multifida, also known as the croton or bush manioc, is a perennial shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Manihot palmata var. multifida include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating digestive problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
